creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Is this a followup to ports/104117?  There is not enough context here for 
me to be able to tell. 

Please, when Cc:ing gnats, don't remove the 'Re: ports/XXX: ' bits in the 
Subject line.  That's what the code uses to correctly file the PR as a 
followup; if it can't do that, it opens a new one, and that creates work 
for someone to try to puzzle out what it's about.
